message: docs: add README with experimental disclaimer

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+# EdgeQ
+
+> **Experimental** — this project is a work-in-progress exploration. Not production-ready.
+
+Serverless columnar query engine on Cloudflare Durable Objects. Queries Lance and Parquet files in R2 with cached metadata and parallel range reads.
+
+## Status
+
+Early prototype. The architecture and API are subject to change.
+
+## License
+
+MIT
